title: MANGA NGE Ah so unloved
wikitext:
[]: [NGE] Ah, so unloved...             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 26, 2006 4:15 pm It's funny that the LAEM subforum -- for a project that we don't even know will happen -- has over twice the posts of this one. The single thread for Rebuild is already edging up to Manga's total post count (and the "New Manga Stage" thread in News doesn't add a whole lot). Is the manga just unloved, or is there simply little to say? On a side note, ever seen the sorts of discussion that happens at the Eva Mailing List over the manga? Unbelievable.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Nov 26, 2006 5:19 pm Ummmm I HEARD THE MANGA WAS NOT ANIMATED But yeah, I dunno, I've read most of it and I don't really think I have anything to say about it, perhaps it's not as much of a discuss-able subject as the movies and series. Oh well.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Nov 26, 2006 5:28 pm I'm waiting for it to finish before I think about it too much.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Nov 26, 2006 5:44 pm There is definitely the fact that it's not finished to consider. I personally avoid passing criticsm on something that I've yet to see in its entirety. Given that the Eva manga isn't finished yet, it can be hard to discuss it at any great length. And then there's the non-canonical nature to consider, and the mere fact that it's different or "inferior" from the anime.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Sun Nov 26, 2006 11:33 pm There are a lot of things in the manga that I like better than their anime counterparts. The thing that bugs me the most though, is that Shinji is a little too different than his anime self. But I like Rei being a little more human. It's more realistic. I like the scene in which she tries to make Shinji some tea, gets burned but don't seem to care about it, whereas Shinji makes a big deal out of it. :)

[]:             Quote Post by directedition » Sun Nov 26, 2006 11:50 pm Not enough strangulation in the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 27, 2006 12:54 am directedition wrote: Not enough strangulation in the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Mon Nov 27, 2006 1:10 am its cuz we havent had Sadamoto's idea of a WHAT THE FLYING F**K WAS THAT?!?!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Nov 27, 2006 1:25 am I have no strong feelings either way with the Eva manga. It lacks a degree of introspective character study that I found so fascinating about the Eva anime. The slow pace of production has also hurt the enjoyment factor of the comic. I've been anticipating the end of the comic since the Otakon 2002 Eva panel that Carl Horn and Tiffany Grant hosted. That was before I even started this website, fyi. I feel especially bad for any of the Japanese fans that may have been following the comic since its start.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Mon Nov 27, 2006 2:32 pm Reichu wrote: directedition wrote: Not enough strangulation in the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Thu Nov 30, 2006 6:04 pm Reichu wrote: directedition wrote: Not enough strangulation in the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by directedition » Thu Nov 30, 2006 7:16 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: The slow pace of production has also hurt the enjoyment factor of the comic.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Thu Nov 30, 2006 9:09 pm Has the manga even sold well?

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Fri Dec 01, 2006 5:50 am It's Evangelion. I don't see how it couldn't have sold well.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 03, 2006 9:53 pm I'm petty much waiting for volumes 11-13 to be out, translated or raw, before I pass judgement on it. btw, does the orginal (nihongo, duh) manga have furigana, ala Girlfriend of Steel 2? (Having untranslated GoS2 vols. 4-6 manga scans on computer= me happy. )

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Wed Dec 13, 2006 6:25 pm For me, I am waiting for Vol. 10. Until then, there isn't much to say.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Thu Dec 14, 2006 6:50 am Here's waiting for Vol. 9, since I chose to support the industry and buy the domestic version.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Thu Dec 14, 2006 10:02 am I'm waiting for Volume 10 to come out over here, read Volumes 1-9 through twice and don't really have any feelings on it. It's good I guess but it lacks something the series had.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Fri Dec 15, 2006 1:39 am I honestly like the manga, and if they adapt some of Sadamoto's short cuts into the LAME, it'll be a better movie then what I think it'll be like. Plus, even if the manga wasn't running, GAINAX would be milking Eva merch still.

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Fri Jan 05, 2007 1:42 am ThroneofDravaris wrote: It's Evangelion. I don't see how it couldn't have sold well.
